Package index

Initialization

Functions for setting up the dsHPC environment within DataSHIELD

dsHPC.init()
dsHPC: DataSHIELD Interface for High-Performance Computing

Job Management

Functions for submitting and managing Slurm jobs

dsHPC.submit()
Submit Job by Function
dsHPC.submit_by_name()
Submit a Function Execution as a Job by Name
dsHPC.status()
Get Job Status
dsHPC.result()
Get Job Result
dsHPC.list_jobs()
List All Jobs
dsHPC.cancel()
Cancel a Job
dsHPC.wrap_function()
Function Wrapping Utility

Python Integration

Functions for Python integration

dsHPC.submit_python()
Python Integration Functions for dsHPC
dsHPC.create_test_image()
Create Test Image
dsHPC.get_image_info()
Get Basic Image Information
dsHPC.apply_filter()
Apply Image Filter
dsHPC.test_image_path()
Get Path to Test Image
pillow_test
Python PIL/Pillow Image Processing Functions

Cache Management

Functions for managing the result cache

dsHPC.clean_cache()
Clean Old Cached Results

Internal Functions

Internal utility functions

create_job_hash()
Utility Functions for the dsHPC Package
generate_job_id()
Generate Unique Job ID
format_function_call()
Format Function Call for Execution
test_utils
Utility Functions for Testing
dsHPC dsHPC-package
dsHPC: DataSHIELD Interface for High-Performance Computing
is_datashield_env()
